title: cyperus alaticaulis
intro: Cyperus alaticaulis, also known as umbrella sedge, is a type of sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Cyperus alaticaulis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the respiratory system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat coughs, colds, and other respiratory issues.
